text.title: guardrails-ai-framework Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for guardrails-ai-framework as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Setting max_reasks to unlimited (or very high) in Guard configuration.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Each reask is an additional LLM call. Unlimited reasks can cause infinite loops when the LLM consistently fails to satisfy the validator. Set max_reasks=3 and handle the final failure case explicitly with a fallback response.

failure-mode.description: Using Guardrails AI for input validation without a separate injection detection layer.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Guardrails AI validators run on LLM output, not input. Input injection detection requires a separate mechanism (regex patterns, a dedicated classifier, or NeMo's input rails) before the LLM call.
